privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent, acting as an Occupational Health Physician, to treat the synthetic patient Bonifacio Caput for a workplace chemical splash injury. The agent must prescribe appropriate wound care (e.g. Silver sulfadiazine, Bacitracin, or Mupirocin), order at least 2 baseline/toxicology labs, document a 'T' prefix ICD-10 chemical burn diagnosis (such as T54), and schedule a wound reassessment follow-up between 3 and 10 days.
